caption: A screen recording captures a web browser displaying several open tabs, including "Trust & Learning by Systemic", "Resonance, by SystemicWiki", "Future of Society by Systemic", "Insights → Introduction | Kumu", and "Road Community Feed Spotter". The main window shows a digital mind map or node-based diagram with circular icons and connecting lines on a dark background. Within this interface, a small video window shows a person in a red shirt and another person sitting in a room with a wooden cabinet and a lamp. To the right of the main screen, a separate video feed displays a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black shirt. As the sequence progresses, the man in the cap moves slightly, and the browser tabs remain static. On-screen text includes labels such as "starting" and "play" next to the circular nodes of the diagram.
